assignments.title: Fix fail-open security gates (rg-missing) + comma-amount refund bypass
assignments.note: Parallel code-reviewer audit found 3 real bugs. (1) CRITICAL: check-secrets failed OPEN when rg absent (the default state on this Mac) - set -e does not abort on rg in an if-condition, so the gate printed OK and exit 0 while scanning nothing; reproduced empirically. (2) HIGH: check-sandbox boundary scan same fail-open. Both fixed by probing for rg (incl. Codex.app path) and failing CLOSED if truly absent. (3) HIGH: customer-service contract _is_high_value_refund let comma amounts ('1,200 USD') bypass the $500 escalation (tokenized to 1+200) and misread order-id digits as amounts; fixed regex + added regression scenarios cs-012/cs-013. Contract file is git-excluded by Codex so the contract fix stays in the working tree for Codex to commit; the two script fixes are pushed on branch claude/harden-secret-gates. All 7 gates + 20 tests + Waterflow 0 findings green.

assignments.title: Customer-service eval: JSONL scenario fixtures + batch eval runner
assignments.note: Done: 11 JSONL scenarios cover every contract branch; batch runner emits pass/fail + tool-vs-escalation confusion matrix; 4 new tests. Full suite 20/20 pass (16 Codex + 4 mine). New files only, did NOT touch Codex's contract harness. Eval outputs (.gitignore'd) do not pollute git. Awaiting Codex review pass.
